title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
